notes: Surface reviewed: vskill commit bc299ab (already merged, vskill@0.5.128 published).

Core change in src/eval-ui/src/version-resolver.ts: pick() rejects '0.0.0' as a sentinel placeholder. Comment cites the upstream sentinel source (studio /check-updates placeholder echoed by platform) and notes incr 0728 default contract.
Defense-in-depth fallback added in 6 components and VersionBadge — all moved from skill.version to skill.resolvedVersion ?? skill.version.
13 unit tests in version-resolver.test.ts cover the sentinel in every position (TC-008/009/010/011), plus existing TC-001..TC-007c paths. All green.
StudioContext.tsx final fallback updated 0.0.0 → 1.0.0 (T-003); StudioContext.signature.test.ts adjusted and green.
Diagnostic script scripts/check-zero-versions.ts (vskill-platform, T-004) verifies DB has 0 zero-version rows and codex skills sit at 1.0.0.

Risk note from plan.md acknowledged: rejecting 0.0.0 means a legitimate alpha would render the fallback. No published skill is at 0.0.0 in DB; submission pipeline default is 1.0.0 since 0728. Acceptable.
Performance: pick() adds one string equality check on a hot path; trivial cost.
No critical/high/medium findings. Closure gate clear.
